title: Oracle SODA Document
description: Represents a JSON document stored in an Oracle SODA collection, including metadata such as key, version, and timestamps managed by the database.

id.description: Unique document key assigned by the server or client

etag.description: Entity tag representing the document version for optimistic concurrency control

lastModified.description: Timestamp of the last modification to the document

created.description: Timestamp when the document was created

mediaType.description: Content type for non-JSON documents (e.g., image/jpeg)

bytes.description: Content length in bytes for non-JSON documents
